questions.explanation: In the story, a kind lady found and raised the bear cub as her own child.

questions.text: The bear was tied with a chain all the time.
questions.explanation: The bear was only tied when necessary. Otherwise, it roamed freely in the house and garden.

questions.text: How did the bear show affection?
questions.correctAnswer: The bear showed affection by licking people and playing with them.
questions.explanation: The bear expressed love through gentle licking, playing, and following people around.
In the story, the bear loved eating bread and would wait for it eagerly.
